overall_assessment: The TODO had the right runtime lanes, but the ADB/device obligation was too generic to prevent another false-green delivery. The contract needed named source-owned device tests, especially for Discovery.

findings.title: ADB/device evidence was underspecified
findings.rationale: The TODO required device/runtime validation but only as a generic ADB pass. That is not enough for a repeated gap surface. The contract must name the source-owned integration tests or explicitly require creating them.
findings.suggested_action: Name the concrete Home device tests already available and require a dedicated Discovery runtime-facets integration test if no existing device test covers that flow.
